Flow.description: Edit customer details and submit to CMDM via CustomerAPI External Service
Flow.label: Edit Customer CMDM

formulas.name: frm_NameChanged
formulas.expression: OR( AND({!var_IsPersonAccount} = TRUE, OR( BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.FirstName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.FirstName},""), BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.MiddleName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.MiddleName},""), BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.LastName},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.LastName},"") )), AND({!var_IsPersonAccount} = FALSE, BLANKVALUE({!var_OrigAccount.Name},"") <> BLANKVALUE({!var_EditAccount.Name},"")) )

fields.name: Source_System_ID_Display
fields.fieldText:
Source System ID: {!var_OrigAccount.SourceSystemId__c}

Reference only — not editable.

fields.name: Privacy_Warning
fields.fieldText: Important: Customers can only update their own information, please do not update information for another party.

fields.name: Name_Input
fields.fieldText: Business Name

fields.name: FirstName_Input
fields.fieldText: First Name

fields.name: MiddleName_Input
fields.fieldText: Middle Name

fields.name: LastName_Input
fields.fieldText: Last Name

fields.name: PreferredName_Input
fields.fieldText: Preferred Name

fields.name: Birthdate_Input
fields.fieldText: Date of Birth

fields.name: MarketingConsent_Input
fields.fieldText: Marketing Consent

fields.name: Title_Input
fields.fieldText: Title

fields.name: Gender_Input
fields.fieldText: Gender

fields.name: Mobile_Input
fields.fieldText: Mobile Phone

fields.name: Email_Input
fields.fieldText: Email

fields.name: Instructions_Header
fields.fieldText:
AGENT INSTRUCTIONS

Please review the following actions before saving.

fields.name: Inst_Driver
fields.fieldText: Driver details: Please ensure driver details are updated on each motor policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_DOB_Driver
fields.fieldText: Driver DOB: Please ensure driver DOB is updated on each motor policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_DOB_Home
fields.fieldText: Home/Contents oldest DOB: Please ensure oldest DOB is updated on each home, contents, and landlord policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_END_Mobile
fields.fieldText: END Consent: Please ensure END is up to date on each policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_END_Email
fields.fieldText: END Consent: Please ensure END is up to date on each policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_Address
fields.fieldText: Risk Address: Please ensure risk address, and policy postal address, is updated on each policy if applicable.

fields.name: Inst_Protect
fields.fieldText: Protect policies: Please ensure details are up to date on each policy in Protect — these will not auto-update.

fields.name: Summary_Header_Title
fields.fieldText:
CHANGE SUMMARY

Please review the changes below before saving.

fields.name: Summary_Table_Header
fields.fieldText: FieldCurrentProposed

fields.name: Sum_Name_Person
fields.fieldText: Name{!var_OrigAccount.FirstName} {!var_OrigAccount.MiddleName} {!var_OrigAccount.LastName}{!var_EditAccount.FirstName} {!var_EditAccount.MiddleName} {!var_EditAccount.LastName}

fields.name: Sum_Name_Business
fields.fieldText: Business Name{!var_OrigAccount.Name}{!var_EditAccount.Name}

fields.name: Sum_Preferred
fields.fieldText: Preferred Name{!var_OrigAccount.FinServ__PreferredName__pc}{!var_EditAccount.FinServ__PreferredName__pc}

fields.name: Sum_DOB
fields.fieldText: Date of Birth{!var_OrigAccount.PersonBirthdate}{!var_EditAccount.PersonBirthdate}

fields.name: Sum_Marketing
fields.fieldText: Marketing Consent{!var_OrigAccount.MarketingConsent__c}{!var_EditAccount.MarketingConsent__c}

fields.name: Sum_Mobile
fields.fieldText: Mobile{!var_OrigAccount.PersonMobilePhone}{!var_EditAccount.PersonMobilePhone}

fields.name: Sum_Email
fields.fieldText: Email{!var_OrigAccount.PersonEmail}{!var_EditAccount.PersonEmail}

fields.name: Sum_Address
fields.fieldText: Address{!var_OrigAccount.PersonMailingStreet}, {!var_OrigAccount.PersonMailingCity} {!var_OrigAccount.PersonMailingPostalCode}{!var_StreetNumber} {!var_StreetName} {!var_StreetType}, {!var_Locality}, {!var_TownCity} {!var_Postcode}

fields.name: Sum_Title
fields.fieldText: Title{!var_OrigAccount.Salutation}{!var_EditAccount.Salutation}

fields.name: Sum_Gender
fields.fieldText: Gender{!var_OrigAccount.FinServ__Gender__pc}{!var_EditAccount.FinServ__Gender__pc}

fields.name: Success_Message
fields.fieldText:
Customer details submitted successfully.

The changes will appear on this account shortly via Customer Events. Any Duck Creek policies will be automatically endorsed by INTG-168.

fields.name: Error_Message
fields.fieldText:
We couldn't submit the changes.

{!var_CMDMError}

Please try again or contact your administrator if the problem persists.

fields.name: NoChanges_Message
fields.fieldText: No changes detected. Please go back and make changes, or close this flow.
